title: Helix Slides
description: Auto-generate on-brand Budget Thuis slide decks directly from a prompt — no Figma, no manual formatting.
longDescription:
Helix Slides is a Claude Code skill that produces fully self-contained HTML presentation files styled to the Budget Thuis brand. Give it a topic and a handful of bullet points and it returns a polished deck with cover slide, section dividers, two-column layouts, stat cards and smooth CSS animations — all in a single file that opens anywhere without a build step.

Built on the Helix Design System tokens: brand colours, Budget Greet Narrow for headings, Inter for body text. Every output is pixel-consistent with the visual identity.
